message:
feat: trigger VA reconciliation on deployment delete events (#501)

When a deployment is deleted, the VA reconciler is now triggered so that:
- VA status can be updated to reflect the missing deployment
- Associated metrics can be cleared or updated
- VA can be marked as not ready until the deployment is recreated

Previously, only Create events triggered reconciliation for deployments.

Closes #497

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
